name: Battleground Update
subject: Our dislike for copy machines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
For the past six years, Joe has always put Indiana first, whether it's protecting access to affordable health care, defending Social Security, or standing up to make sure our nation's servicemembers g |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21ff/7377f838/3fe17428/51f90f99/4118149961/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?refcode=20180530.2nd&amount=10")
---
Peter -- Here's the latest:
* Joe now has an opponent, one who is getting help from Donald Trump, Mike Pence, Mitch McConnell, and Karl Rove.
* They've already made Indiana's Senate race **the most expensive in the country.**
* And if these hyperpartisan political forces are successful, Hoosiers' champion in the Senate -- Joe -- will be replaced with a "copy machine" for President Trump.

**But YOU can keep it from happening. We 're still 425 new donors short of our 1,100 May goal. Will you help us close the gap before tomorrow's deadline?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21ff/7377f838/3fe17428/51f90f98/4118149961/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.2nd&amount=10")**

**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21ff/7377f838/3fe17428/51f90f9a/4118149961/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21ff/7377f838/3fe17428/51f90f95/4118149961/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21ff/7377f838/3fe17428/51f90f94/4118149961/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?refcode=20180530.2nd")**
We must re-elect a senator who is independent -- not someone who will support the president's agenda without question. For the past six years, Joe has always put Indiana first, whether it's protecting access to affordable health care, defending Social Security, or standing up to make sure our nation's servicemembers get the care they deserve.

**But if we don 't hit this goal, we could end up with a senator who's nothing more than a Trump-Pence copy machine.**

**Don 't let it happen. [Pitch in $5 now to help us hit our end-of-month goal and re-elect Joe Donnelly!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21ff/7377f838/3fe17428/51f90f99/4118149961/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eommaynd?refcode=20180530.2nd&amount=10")**

\-- Team Donnelly

name: URGENT@DebbieWassermanSchultz.com
subject: National Republicans BIG ad buy in FL
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | News broke not too long ago now -- Republicans are buying ads in Miami. According to a report in the Florida Politics blog : **_"...the National Republican Congressional Committee [...] will spend $3.2 million in the Miami market."_** Debbie is speaking out against the failures of Republicans in Congress and the Trump administration. The Koch brothers are already running ads against her in South Florida. We need to answer these attacks and fight back. It's our job to make sure this campaign has the resources to win. **With the Koch Brothers on the attack, we need to be very good at that job right now.** [**_Our deadline to reach $20,000 is in another 24 hours. Don't wait until the last minute. Rush in your contribution now >>_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f20/622b7b5b/1ae68600/307b82d1/858434783/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524d?refcode=dwse180524d_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks! Team DWS
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juan_Pe=C3=B1alosa?=
subject: it's a lovefest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| I have to say, the Republicans are now on the offensive in Florida -- which means our grassroots energy is being tested.

As I write to you, every single Republican candidate for governor is racing to be Trump's #1 supporter.

**The Trump administration couldn 't be happier about it.**

But I've got good news: I was just checking in with our team and they told me we are on track to SMASH our fundraising goal for the month.

[**If we can hit it, we 'll send a message to the GOP that Florida Democrats are taking this fight all the way. Can we count on you to rush a $5 contribution right now? We have to build up our strength ASAP.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-may-18-eom?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+If+we+can+hit+it+wersquoll+send+a+messag&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180530_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180530_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180530_2_5") __**Democrats are depending on you.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a link below. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: It's the night before our deadline and I'm asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I don't want you to think that all of your hard work and support has gone unnoticed. Month after month, my team and I lean on you when the going gets tough. Each and every time, you've risen to the occasion and we've pulled through stronger than ever. Tomorrow night's goal is the biggest goal of the general election. **I 'm proud to say we're closing the gap.** [_**If each of you could give just $5, we could hit our goal and continue our work building the best grassroots team imaginable. Give $5 Peter:**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec5/493551263/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?refcode=sbe180530pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec4/493551263/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180530pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec4/493551263/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180530pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec4/493551263/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180530pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec5/493551263/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?refcode=sbe180530pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I could sit here and talk with you all night about how the polls in this race are getting tight. Or how Donald Trump raised $50,000 for my opponent with the click of a button. But you know that. I'm checking in with you to make sure you know I appreciate everything you've done. When we pull off a victory over special interests in November, **I 'll have you to thank.** [_**So before you put away your phone or close your laptop for the night, I 'm asking for $5 so my team can have the resources we need to win.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec5/493551263/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?refcode=sbe180530pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad8/4462dc26/53c44ed8/2007eec5/493551263/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530pm?refcode=sbe180530pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

With gratitude,
Sherrod

body:

| _**Campaign update for you:**_ **Deadline: Midnight Tomorrow** **Left to Raise: $2,074** [**Rush a donation before the deadline >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.30_b2_da_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Friends, When you're the most endangered Democrat in the entire House, you can't afford to miss a single goal. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. We'll only make it with "=" "=" Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

### [Is There Anything That Can Be Done to Reduce Gas Prices?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykjiuyk-kujkulhluu-d/)
If you've filled up your gas tank recently, you're aware that prices have been going through the roof. They've gone from about $2.29 a gallon to approximately $3.00 a gallon in what seems like no time. Is there anything that can be done to reverse this trend? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykjiuyk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykjiuyk-kujkulhluu-k/)

name: The White House
subject: Giving terminally ill patients a chance, here at home
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd3f8d44d3ae9a79e43b4d6ea59e4023073cd075ab7970964ea593cfd039d4b8f28cd37d66b2dddacbcf30ef5e982f335ba) The White House • May 31, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump travels to Texas, where he will meet with family members and community leaders affected by this month's tragic shooting at Santa Fe High School. [Read the President's May 18 Proclamation honoring victims. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd3ff83a8f46c235fbfe5733dbfda1edbf8debf7d043150ade2820ddb90fd0113fdf6407dfd69591df86a99995a42b9cc3f) |
---
|

## Giving terminally ill patients a chance, here at home
**An estimated 609,640 Americans will die from cancer alone in 2018** , according to the National Cancer Institute. Before yesterday, the options for terminally ill patients who had exhausted all available treatments were extremely limited. Only 3 percent of cancer patients today are enrolled in clinical trials for new medication, for instance.
**With President Trump's signature, this bleak picture changes**. The "Right to Try" law he signed yesterday gives more than 1 million Americans who die each year from terminal illnesses a new tool to make potentially lifesaving treatment decisions. The act amends Federal law to allow certain unapproved, experimental drugs to be administered to terminally ill patients who have exhausted all approved treatment options and are unable to participate in clinical drug trials.
**"People who are terminally ill should not have to go from country to country to seek a cure,"** President Trump says. "I'd see people-friends of mine, and other people I'd read about, where they'd travel all over the world looking for a cure. And we have the best medical people in the world."
[President Trump fulfills his promise to expand options for terminally ill Americans. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd38d979b518de29b3c5ad2bff5c67d816330a37cdb3a1e32663dae1befa0b165bac063d906e8182c782b3e434afb68a957)
**Bonus read** : ["Thank Republicans for your right to try," says AEI's Marc Thiessen ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd39c857d5f15e0497eb4b65da58f1c476a50e6b7e8f90bc7663b0f46d0a041ecc2c98f93f2b28b4ee8563851ee2410acc8)

---
|

## 250 kids join President Trump on the South Lawn
**Sports participation and physical activity are crucial for child development** , supporting personal and social growth, lifetime health and fitness habits, and a competitive spirit. Children that play sports have higher educational achievement, earn higher incomes as adults, and have improved mental health.
**Each president since Dwight Eisenhower has convened a Council on Fitness** to focus on various sports, nutrition, and well-being initiatives. President Trump has given his Council a clear purpose: to reverse the declining trend of youth sports participation and to ensure that all American children are given the opportunity to compete.
**To introduce his intended Council appointees** , the President invited several hundred children, parents, and coaches to the White House for a field day on the South Lawn. Athletes such as Mariano Rivera, Herschel Walker, and Misty May-Treanor joined youth participants in activities ranging from flag football to volleyball.
[Watch President Trump host field day at the White House. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd313330f8b0c81ee528d8608cd571260952a7c46e0fe21d80aefe38cc9784bc5addec357426ac3da1a5e2ad5029b655fbb)
**In-depth report** : [The potential for youth sports to improve childhood outcomes](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd35cb7aa10b0a16ec6fadde269ed21b0fde7c187f12c612fff176e178e6d38b7fc0104d5da1095cfb0594bd5838845446c)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Trump delivers remarks and participates in the White House Sports and Fitness Day** | May 30, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd3976e1140f6edc34749ea638da1ac5dd73244915de389b22c08fc39977808f55deadf69a6cf33c786bffaeca1c64edc6f) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=41ed390c99bd2bd36c6a89d1591a00927f3d0dca9501c2addfe6bb18f9e3db06557514891e8020a71cbf42ee40e44ca6bdffd208a8b0327a) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43bbceb839018cd7e0944fb46d64dae29f4ad9684eec161a72c80b9a21ebc454db493050afa1347433376171ff75efdf8afcab0d4ebfde050)
---

Children that play sports have higher educational achievement, earn higher incomes as adults, and have improved mental health. Each president since Dwight Eisenhower has convened a Council on Fitness to focus on various sports, nutrition, and well-being initiatives. President Trump has given his Council a clear purpose: to reverse the declining trend of youth sports participation and to ensure that all American children are given the opportunity to compete. To introduce his intended Council appointees , the President invited several hundred children, parents, and coaches to the White House for a field day on the South Lawn. Athletes such as Mariano Rivera, Herschel Walker, and Misty May-Treanor joined youth participants in activities ranging from flag football to volleyball. In-depth report : | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks President Trump delivers remarks and participates in the White House Sports and Fitness Day | May 30, 2018 | |

name: Rep. Joe Kennedy III
subject: I'm asking you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
It would be easy to dismiss this last year as chaos. But it's far, far bigger than that, Derek.
---
Our country is facing an important choice this year, Derek.

Do we fight for the values that unite us, or do we accept the Republican Party's dispiriting and dangerous notion that somehow we are better when we are divided?

Right now, it's more important than ever before that we elect Democrats who will fight for our shared values -- and with an important fundraising deadline coming up tonight at midnight, there's no better time to show where you stand.

**Can I count on you to make a $3 donation before tonight's critical deadline to elect Democrats nationwide?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc6c/1591132878/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jk-may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc6d/1591132878/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jk-may-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc6a/1591132878/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jk-may-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc6b/1591132878/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jk-may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc68/1591132878/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jk-may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc69/1591132878/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jk-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")
** It would be easy to dismiss this last year as chaos. But it's far, far bigger than that.

This administration and this Republican-led Congress aren't just targeting the laws that protect us. They are targeting the very idea that we are all worthy of dignity and respect.

They don't want to protect immigrants who consider this country home or expand health care for those who need it most. They believe we must choose whether we invest in rural communities or inner cities. They're turning our society into a zero-sum game where for one to win, another must lose. As if the mechanic in Pittsburgh and the teacher in Tulsa and the day care worker in Birmingham are somehow bitter rivals, rather than mutual casualties of a system forcefully rigged for those at the top.

I've got news for them, Derek. We don't have to choose who makes the cut. The richest nation in the world should not leave anyone behind.

Tonight's fundraising deadline is about more than just wins and losses in November -- it's about fighting for the fundamental values that define who we are as a country.

**[That's why I'm asking: Will you make a $3 contribution before tonight's deadline? Your donation will help elect Democrats nationwide who will work tirelessly to protect the values that unite us.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc76/1591132878/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jk-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Thats+why+Im+asking+Will+you+make+a+if+c&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd")**

Thanks for your continued support,

Joe

Joe Kennedy III
U.S. Representative, MA-04

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc77/1591132878/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc74/1591132878/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc75/1591132878/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d0b/4067b0a/5b5d50999/7fb9dc72/1591132878/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180531_jk_nd&source=em_20180531_jk_nd&refcode=em_20180531_jk_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

| | Friends,
I'm excited to share that the Family Research Council's FRC Action PAC has endorsed my campaign for reelection in AL-02!
The Family Research Council is a Christian public policy ministry dedicated to defending religious liberty, the unborn, and families.
I am honored to have [the strong support of the Family Research Council](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=101A123A9A3693), and I appreciate their important work to protect the family values that are dear to the people who live and work in Alabama's Second District. I am eager to continue our efforts to defend life at every stage and to ensure that organizations providing abortions do not receive taxpayer dollars.
\- Martha

name: Dana Bye
subject: Working to be everywhere, including in mailboxes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

We're in the home stretch with the June 12 primary election less than two weeks away. Since the beginning, we've relied on authentic grassroots energy, and we need your continued support to keep the momentum going. We are preparing to release our last mail piece and need your help to get it out.

Have you seen our second mail piece which highlighted our pledge to not take corporate PAC money? The responses have been fantastic.
[

](https://act.myngp.com/el/gwujvoSkV_nb6FLBQkBa0CPSn0evY5I3Ofc0CsUqpHI=/XzYNBLh7cTxaY_qV2xMWFVaaiN3PKRM57ogJDOxQDBs=?refcode=inside_elections)

Voters in the 7th District are responding to Abigail's integrity, dedication, and experience. As May draws to a close, we must build off this success and continue reaching voters.

[**We have one more great piece to get out to voters and need to raise $17,360 to send it out. Can you make a contribution to get us across the finish line?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gwujvoSkV_nb6FLBQkBa0CPSn0evY5I3Ofc0CsUqpHI=/3jM_P8RA58BKro97qvUS36CXZMDSTrJ6OocG1cNiwtY=?refcode=eom_may18)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gwujvoSkV_nb6FLBQkBa0CPSn0evY5I3Ofc0CsUqpHI=/3jM_P8RA58BKro97qvUS36CXZMDSTrJ6OocG1cNiwtY=?refcode=eom_may18)
Thank you for getting us this far and for believing that we can change the conversation in Washington with leaders like Abigail.

Onwards,

\- Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gwujvoSkV_nb6FLBQkBa0CPSn0evY5I3Ofc0CsUqpHI=/iOcVlxoqBTDquJkat9aG0iNxEFXQikiL2hQuJJy7R5E=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/gwujvoSkV_nb6FLBQkBa0CPSn0evY5I3Ofc0CsUqpHI=/5GVuiLDDtNa64qHJAu9Ma7dBXMdUM3cTwdhLKUL7iwI=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi --

Our convention starts in less than 24 hours. On Friday Minnesotans will come together from across the state to stand up for our democracy, our values, and for the people of this country.

**And when we stand together, we get things done for all Americans.**

Remember when the President and his allies tried to take away healthcare coverage from millions of Americans? All 48 Senate Democrats stood together -- and three brave Republicans joined us -- and together we defeated that bill. We stood together and we helped people across America.

**Now we need to come together once again to win in November.**

**Will you stand with me and contribute today to help us reach our $30,000 pre-convention goal?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Hi -- Our convention starts in less than 24 hours. On Friday Minnesotans will come together from across the state to stand up for our democracy, our values, and for the people of this country. And when we stand together, we get things done for all Americans. Remember when the President and his allies tried to take away healthcare coverage from millions of Americans? All 48 Senate Democrats stood together -- and three brave Republicans joined us -- and together we defeated that bill. We stood together and we helped people across America. Now we need to come together once again to win in November. Will you stand with me and contribute today to help us reach our $30,000 pre-convention goal? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** With your help, we can make it by the deadline! \-- Amy

body:
Devin Nunes contacted you. Paul Ryan contacted you.
Now, I’m emailing you. The situation could not get any more dire, Fellow Conservative:
Today marks the last FEC deadline before we start developing our ads for the general election. House Republicans still are $50,000 away from their revenue goal to place ads in competitive districts.
**[>Defend the majority now<](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTUxLWI5MjlhNmM4MGZlNDRiMmQ5ZWQ2ODZmNGZkMjBlY2Mw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLm5yY2Mub3JnL2ZlYy1lbmQtb2YtcXVhcnRlci1kZWFkbGluZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UEFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFByb3NwZWN0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDUzMV9QQUUtR09QM19TdGV2ZVNjYWxpc2UmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA1MzFfSGlzdG9yeUxlc3Nvbg&K=oPeGoYeoa7vLXokoFcGE4Q)**
This is Nancy Pelosi’s last stand. She is trying everything to ensure she becomes Speaker. If she fails, her fellow Democrats will turn on her to save themselves.
**I’ll get right to the point:** if we don’t act now, Pelosi’s desperate act could succeed.
There’s no time to lose. Let’s defeat the Democrats and send Pelosi home once and for all.
Will you stand up right now?

clean_body: Devin Nunes contacted you. Paul Ryan contacted you. Now, I’m emailing you. The situation could not get any more dire, Fellow Conservative: Today marks the last FEC deadline before we start developing our ads for the general election. House Republicans still are $50,000 away from their revenue goal to place ads in competitive districts. This is Nancy Pelosi’s last stand. She is trying everything to ensure she becomes Speaker. If she fails, her fellow Democrats will turn on her to save themselves. I’ll get right to the point: if we don’t act now, Pelosi’s desperate act could succeed. There’s no time to lose. Let’s defeat the Democrats and send Pelosi home once and for all. Will you stand up right now? QUADRUPLE-MATCH STATUS: ACTIVE Let's go achieve victory, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, Steve ScaliseHouse Majority Whip Prefer to donate by mail? Contributions to the NRCC are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:

I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short. I just checked in with my staff, and they say we're a little behind on our monthly fundraising goal.
Not by a lot. In fact, they told me that if you can give just $3 today, it'll go a really long way toward getting us back on track for May. If you can make a contribution, I'd be very grateful.

name: Jacky
subject: we're going to miss it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there - I'll be honest: we're not where we need to be. Our critical end-of-month deadline is coming up in just a few hours - **and right now, we 're going to miss our goal.**
A new poll has our campaign **neck and neck** with Senator Dean Heller. If we're going to take back the Senate for Democrats in November, we HAVE to win here in Nevada - and that means we have to hit this number.

name: Tom Perez
subject: You haven't donated to elect Democrats this year → Can you chip in before tonight's deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The GOP is going to throw the kitchen sink at every Democrat running, so we have to be ready with strong grassroots organization in every district and state -- and that starts with this deadline.
---
Here's the truth: We face an uphill battle in our fight to retake Congress.

Republicans are going to throw the kitchen sink at every Democrat running for office in November -- we MUST build a strong grassroots organization in every district and state to take them on. That starts with tonight's deadline.

**Make a $3 donation before midnight tonight to help take back Congress this year.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b5bb/855207001/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b5b8/855207001/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b5b9/855207001/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b546/855207001/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b547/855207001/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b544/855207001/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")
** The DNC is organizing in every state across the country -- plus we're making critical investments in state parties to ensure they can support our candidates running in competitive races. There's no question that building power at the local level is how we'll win in November.

**We have a real shot at taking back Congress this year, but Republicans and special interest groups are going to do everything they can to stop us. The stakes are incredibly high -- so I am counting on you to stand with Democrats before tonight's deadline.**

**[Contribute $3 for the first time in 2018 before tonight's deadline. When Democrats celebrate victories up and down the ballot in November, you can be proud to have played a valuable part in making it happen.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b545/855207001/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup29759+3+ag&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. In order to take back Congress this year, it will require an unprecedented amount of grassroots organizing. **[If you're ready to be part of that important work, make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tonight's fundraising deadline.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b542/855207001/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+If+youre+ready+to+be+part+of+that+import&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd")**

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d18/4067b0a/5b453b80a/7fb9b54e/855207001/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180531_tp_nd&source=em_20180531_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180531_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Friend,

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess how many states enforce voter ID requirements
body:
Peter,
In the midst of a busy election year, it’s interesting to look at voter identification requirements in states across the nation.
Guess how many states enforce voter identification requirements? Choose the button below you think is the correct answer and see if you are right:

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Republican attacks? Bring them on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | We know I have five opponents in this race. We have the Koch Brothers already spending dark money against us. **And now, we know the National Republican Congressional Committee is spending more than $3 million on ads in the Miami media market.** | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f21/622b7b5b/1b1f95fe/307b82fa/3439253358/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524e?refcode=dwse180524e_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
I guess my outspoken opposition to the Trump administration has made me some political enemies who'd like to see me gone.
Know what I say to that? **_Have at it._**
When I first ran for office, I was up against six primary opponents. Most people thought it was impossible. But I hit the pavement. I personally knocked on 25,000 doors. And I won.
If I've learned one thing, it's this: _Don't listen to the naysayers._ When you put in the effort and do good work, people respond.
We've been through a lot since that first win. When it comes to protecting the Affordable Care Act, preserving Planned Parenthood funding, keeping Medicare and Social Security intact, and any one of our other dozen priorities, I am not afraid to speak up and speak out. Families in South Florida are counting on me, and I will not let them down.
**But I can 't do this alone.** I rely on you for your help. This is our last day to reach our $22,000 May goal.
[**_If you can, rush in a contribution before midnight. Every dollar makes a difference._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f21/622b7b5b/1b1f95fe/307b82fa/3439253358/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524e?refcode=dwse180524e_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
Thanks.
Debbie

|

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Time sensitive email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, Well, today is the last day of month. You know what that means... Jeff forces me to make hundreds of fundraising phone calls and won’t give me a break until we’ve reached our goal of 1,000 online donors... Seriously, I know this campaign is all about liberty but Jeff can be a tyrant on the last day of the month for fundraising! We can’t save the world if we can’t pay the bills, so I desperately need your help. Friend, I have until midnight to make our goal. Let me tell you why it is so important you make your first online donation to the campaign. We crushed our opponents at the first debate... we’ve generated dozens of stories in the media... Best of all? We conducted a scientific poll showing that we beat Claire McCaskill 56 to 40! Our campaign is gaining momentum. The liberty movement is growing in Missouri and I want you to take part in it. [Friend I am asking you to donate any amount you can to the campaign. Any amount. I don’t care if you donate $3, $5, or $10. name: Betty Weller, MSEA
subject: All for one, and one for all.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
This matters so much.

Friend --
As a public school teacher and mom here in Maryland, I know the value of public education.
I'm so frustrated with the fact that our schools are underfunded and under prioritized, and our kids are getting left behind because of it. We can and should be doing more, and that's why I'm so excited to support Ben as our next governor.
**If you're a parent, educator yourself, or just someone who knows the value of public education, I'm asking you to support Ben today:[ Donate $5 or more now to help raise $25,000 before midnight tonight!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5fe/3748690532/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05318A")**
_Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5f9/3748690532/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=5&refcode=OHQ05318A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5f8/3748690532/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=25&refcode=OHQ05318A&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5fb/3748690532/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=50&refcode=OHQ05318A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5e4/3748690532/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=100&refcode=OHQ05318A&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5e0/3748690532/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=250&refcode=OHQ05318A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5e2/3748690532/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05318A&express_lane=true")
---
Ben comes from a family of public school educators, including his grandmother and both of his parents. In fact, his family members have been educators since they walked out of slavery -- because they knew then, just as Ben knows now, that education is the key to every opportunity.
He has a bold vision for Maryland's future that doesn't start in a decade -- it starts now. Ben wants to raise teacher salaries by 29% and ensure all school employees make a living wage. Most importantly, he wants to close our multi-billion dollar school funding gap and make sure every child has the resources they need to learn no matter what neighborhood they grow up in.
Ben likes to quote literature from time to time, which really touches this English teacher's heart. His favorite right now seems to be _The Three Musketeers_ : All for one, and one for all.
Ben has gotten folks to come together over everything from the death penalty to marriage equality, and there's no issue Marylanders are more ready to come together over than education. That's why I'm proud to support Ben, and so are 74,000 of my fellow educators. All for one, and one for all. All for Ben, who's for all of us, and all our kids.
**With less than a month left before the primary, we need to make sure Ben has the funds to get his message out to voters:[Donate $5 or more before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline to join this grassroots campaign.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5fe/3748690532/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05318A")**
Thanks,
Betty
Betty Weller
President
Maryland State Education Association

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5fe/3748690532/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05318A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5ef/3748690532/VEsHBQ/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5e9/3748690532/VEsHBA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5eb/3748690532/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63e/7ab0e2c4/7f8bf40a/349bb5d5/3748690532/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

Ben has gotten folks to come together over everything from the death penalty to marriage equality, and there's no issue Marylanders are more ready to come together over than education. That's why I'm proud to support Ben, and so are 74,000 of my fellow educators. All for one, and one for all. All for Ben, who's for all of us, and all our kids. With less than a month left before the primary, we need to make sure Ben has the funds to get his message out to voters: "" Thanks, Betty Betty Weller President Maryland State Education Association "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Brendan McPhillips, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Let's keep it up
body:

Friends --

Last week in Georgia we saw Stacey Abrams, an unapologetically progressive candidate, re-write the political playbook. The cynics told her -- just like they've told us -- that she couldn't run and win with big bold ideas.

But she proved them wrong -- and we're ready to do the same thing here in the Sunshine State. And to do that, we need your help, friends.

**[Let's show them we're ready to get rid of the old ways of doing business and win again as progressives. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends,
I'm grateful for your commitment to doing what this country needs from us at this critical moment, helping us to run a campaign that brings in all voices from all parts of Texas - regardless of party, geography or any other small difference. This campaign is about everyone, everywhere, every single day. And you are making it possible.
We've now visited with our fellow Texans in 253 of the 254 counties of this great state. Everywhere I go, I'm meeting extraordinary people who want to do great things for Texas and our country. Friday I got to meet Aurelio Saldaña, one of the members of the 1989 state champion six-man football team, at our Fort Hancock town hall. Later that day we were with more than fifty people who came out to be with us in Van Horn and then spent the end of the day in Mentone, population 19, in Loving County, where I had a chance to meet and listen to Stan.
_Meeting with Aurelio in Fort Hancock._
_Town hall in Van Horn._
_Listening to Stan in Loving County._
Every time you donate, you're literally putting gas in the Dodge Grand Caravan that we've been driving across Texas. There's no private jet -- I'm filling up the tank myself thanks to you. You're helping us show up everywhere and listen to everyone -- nobody's taken for granted, nobody's written off. And because of you, I have the chance to bring the people I meet into this campaign. They're joining our fight to do the big, bold, ambitious work that this state and this country need. In the next five months, we have to reach every Texan so they can join us too.
[**For those who have already contributed this month, thank you. For those who are thinking about giving, we're trying to reach our online fundraising goal of $100,000 by midnight tonight. It's critically important that we don't fall short on this one. Can you give a donation of $3 to help us get there?**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92169/3b1d797/7e674b8d/35a844cd/1568079042/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180531-EOM7&amount=3")
Your willingness to contribute right now will help us to reach our goal.
Reaching our goal helps us to reach the people of Texas.
And reaching the people of Texas helps us to win on the 6th of November, just a little more than five months away.
I'm counting on you. I hope that you'll come through again for us, for Texas and for the country.
Thank you.
Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92169/3b1d797/7e674b8d/35a844cd/1568079042/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180531-EOM7&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92169/3b1d797/7e674b8d/35a844ce/1568079042/VEsF/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you need to update your contact information, [ you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92169/3b1d797/7e674b8d/35a844cf/1568079042/VEsC/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92169/3b1d797/7e674b8d/35a844c0/1568079042/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Senator Jill H. Vogel- Budget Wrap Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,
The Senate finally completed our budget late yesterday. We have been hard at work since January and no one expected that we would be in session until almost June to finish the process. This week's votes started on Tuesday when the Senate Finance Committee met in a contentious meeting to consider competing budget proposals--a House budget proposal that included money for Medicaid expansion and our Senate budget proposal that did not. I voted for the clean Senate budget and stood by those votes through the process. It was a budget that I was proud of and it was a product that many of us had worked on for more than a year. However, as we had learned weeks before, we did not have the votes to pass the Senate budget out of the full Senate. Yesterday, as anticipated, once the Senate's version got to the floor, opponents of that bill voted to substitute the House bill. Again I voted for our Senate bill and then we moved on to votes on the House substitute. Hours of debate followed on individual parts of the bill, mostly on the healthcare components. Individual members who opposed Medicaid had the opportunity to pull the Medicaid sections out of the budget and vote for or against Medicaid and for or against separate reform measures. Many amendments were offered on countless other sections of the budget and recorded votes were taken on each of those actions. In the end, I voted with the majority of Senate Republicans on the votes against expansion and for additional reforms. However, I voted for the final budget. For those who are critical of Medicaid in this budget, rest assured that there is no ambiguity about where I have been regarding concerns about expanding that program. In previous legislative updates I have laid out the economics of expansion and expressed my grave concerns about the long- term fiscal impact. However, Medicaid is merely one part of this budget and as negotiations progressed I pressed for many important things to be included in the budget that were very important to me and to my district. To succeed in getting good measures included and then to vote against them is both negotiating in bad faith and shows a total lack of integrity. The people of my district elected me to work in their best interest. For the greater good, we should pass a budget before the nearing deadline and not shut down government. I am so proud that this budget included a critical judgeship in Loudoun that was very important to me and to Senator Dick Black. It also included resources for the Innovation Center in Winchester, the Laurel Center, Great Meadow, money for agriculture and conservation in our district, money for Sheriffs, ID/DD waivers, money for autism services, the Inland Port, and the list of matters important to constituencies in the 27th district is very long. Moreover, the larger budget has a lot that I am proud to support. It has significant reform measures as well as key funding for transportation, veterans, public safety, education, technology, broadband, agriculture and forestry, commerce and trade, the Courts, higher ed and funding for localities who depend on our budget decisions to make their own budgets. With a few exceptions, the feedback on my work in this process has been overwhelmingly positive--more than at any time in my ten years in the Senate and most especially from those who have taken the time to actually track the votes and follow the amendments and for that I am very grateful. At the end of this Senate session we had heard thousands of bills and resolutions. The budget bill was merely one of roughly 3,700 bills and resolutions. So we had our work cut out for us and I am pleased to be nearly finished. We still have judges to vote on and await the Governor's action on a few remaining bills. I extend my deepest gratitude to everyone who helped us this session, especially to my staff and to the hundreds of activists and friends who came to visit and who generously contributed to our work on bills and on the budget. I take your comments and feedback seriously and am always grateful to hear from you. Please feel free to email any time that you have questions or comments at [district27@senate.virginia.gov](mailto:district27@senate.virginia.gov). I appreciate the opportunity to serve you and I am grateful for your continued support.

---
|
---
| Senator Jill Vogel
---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
---
| Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates

name: Joe
subject: I'll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Our opponent can rest easy while people like Karl Rove and the Kochs bankroll dark money ads attacking me. |
---

| | I'll make this quick, Peter: our first end-of-month deadline of the general election is coming up at midnight tonight. We're doing everything we can to make sure we hit our goal; meanwhile, our opponent, Rep. Mike Braun, can rest easy while people like Karl Rove and the Kochs bankroll dark money ads attacking me.

Relying on a couple of billionaire mega-donors can start to sound pretty nice when my team and I are working around the clock to build a campaign that can talk to every voter across the state. But you know what? **I 'd rather put in the work with our grassroots team of Hoosiers any day.**

We're not just going to win, Peter. We're going to win on the back of the strongest grassroots team in Indiana. Can you help power my campaign by chipping in before midnight tonight? Here's the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may312018**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21fa/7377f838/3ffbb32b/51f90f00/191860917/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may312018?refcode=20180531.1nd&amount=10")

subject: We’re kicking off our 10-county “Get Out the Vote” tour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QjRr8rZMPDu6LA-uBOPtlZC52-G9KjFKsHyIPx4t43U=/W_NWKgw8oWTO3BmBU_BQgIWCEY13qqD1uqNw0QhdE30=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180531_TM_10tourFR_all-ndnr_logo)

Peter, Election Day is less than a week away--and we're hitting the road!

Before the election on Tuesday, June 5th, we'll be traveling to all 10 counties in the Fourth District to get out the vote in as many communities as we can in this final stretch of the primary.

**In these last days before the primary, it 's critical that we reach every single voter we can. Help us fuel this final sprint--chip in $10 or more to help take us to all 10 counties in the Fourth District: **

[$10 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/QjRr8rZMPDu6LA-uBOPtlZC52-G9KjFKsHyIPx4t43U=/W_NWKgw8oWTO3BmBU_BQgIWCEY13qqD1uqNw0QhdE30=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180531_TM_10tourFR_all-ndnr_10&amount=10) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/QjRr8rZMPDu6LA-uBOPtlZC52-G9KjFKsHyIPx4t43U=/W_NWKgw8oWTO3BmBU_BQgIWCEY13qqD1uqNw0QhdE30=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180531_TM_10tourFR_all-ndnr_25&amount=25)

[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/QjRr8rZMPDu6LA-uBOPtlZC52-G9KjFKsHyIPx4t43U=/W_NWKgw8oWTO3BmBU_BQgIWCEY13qqD1uqNw0QhdE30=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180531_TM_10tourFR_all-ndnr_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/QjRr8rZMPDu6LA-uBOPtlZC52-G9KjFKsHyIPx4t43U=/W_NWKgw8oWTO3BmBU_BQgIWCEY13qqD1uqNw0QhdE30=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180531_TM_10tourFR_all-ndnr_other)

This campaign kicked off with a listening tour, and since then, Jessica has traveled all over our district listening to people's concerns and discussing real solutions.

How we began this primary is how we want to end it--connecting with the people of Northern California. [**Help us go the final distance --chip in $10 now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QjRr8rZMPDu6LA-uBOPtlZC52-G9KjFKsHyIPx4t43U=/AXyasA90a9lm84fOkktTUlHK1DB5glvanri9nqBKLiQ=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180531_TM_10tourFR_all-ndnr_l1)

See you soon in Fresno, Madera, Mariposa, Tuolumne, Calaveras, Amador, Alpine, El Dorado, Placer, and Nevada Counties!

Thank you,
Team Morse

We are ALARMED about the state of the Republican primary for Florida's governorship. Ron DeSantis and Adam Putnam are making this by far **the most extreme, far-right, Trump-loving field of candidates Florida has ever seen.**

**FIRST** , President Trump waded in to endorse **Ron DeSantis** , a far-right extremist whose sole objective is to please Trump and end the Mueller investigation.

**THEN** there's **Adam Putnam** , a "proud NRA sellout" with long-standing alliances to gun-rights groups who vows to take his gun-rights agenda right to the governor's mansion.

**NOW we are less than 100 days away from the primary, and we 're moving full steam ahead to stand against whomever becomes the Republican governor nominee.**

[**We need to ALERT Floridians across the state that what 's happening in Florida's GOP is bad news for the entire country. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LbByO9bfoJM9uE6erG5UT9EIiGpXeIBbZMEPx69vTEY=/qk2kW5kYQjknMnRRC-rdvNy7Xl03rF7wjJ5b26i0GY0=?refcode=May-31-PM-We-cannot-let-Mario-get-a-free-ride)

Friend,
Sam, my campaign manager, is telling me we have not reached our target of 150 contributions.
[**We still need 33 more people to step up before 11:59 PM TONIGHT. Can you help out really quick? All amounts -- even as little as $5 -- provide a big lift to the campaign!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LbByO9bfoJM9uE6erG5UT9EIiGpXeIBbZMEPx69vTEY=/qk2kW5kYQjknMnRRC-rdvNy7Xl03rF7wjJ5b26i0GY0=?refcode=May-31-PM-We-cannot-let-Mario-get-a-free-ride)
I promised voters in the district that Mario Diaz-Balart would not get a free ride in this election. HE NEEDS TO ANSWER FOR:
* his campaign $$$ and 'A rating' from the NRA.
* his denial of science & refusal to act on sea-level rise.
* his dozens of votes to strip people of their healthcare.
* his support for 94% of Trump's policies.

[**Please help us win this district. Right now, the Cook Political Report only has us down 2-4 percentage points. Super Tuesday is now only FIVE days away.

It's the biggest primary election day of the year -- and time is running out to give our candidates one final boost before their elections.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: What I want you to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Friend,

I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want you to know that I’m doing everything I can to earn it.

I know politics can seem hopeless at times. The daily barrage of scandals, lies, corruption, and international blunders coming from the Trump administration can be extremely discouraging, but I want you to know that real progress is being made in the Senate on issues that are important to New Mexico and to people across the country.

**I’m working every day to make sure that we fight back against the disastrous policies of the Trump administration and that our values and ideals are moving forward to improve lives.**

That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November.

**[To make sure that doesn’t happen, we need to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal by bringing in $20,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the deadline?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.2hx/voCM1Wt4Q2ykH3Cl56ZnIA/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFLarG9lvvLmQ192R5PFFMpwFLSNOvaD7fnXIgFtAC2dRzq1-2FKIl5k3AkHl2eI6MW-2Fn-2BjwaEmhM61zBMSivH8kyHbzg9iRMZKhFqhLKtewxwbl36pwdkFiKOWgo6eTHRpoElIaGByJnhoIJz-2BIFOwY5Cdtm2K1pUHoUDb5fu1kGwkhk2TNApFytCtIdGDtHAimL-2FZUioC-2BFxp6TzGAe-2B16QSgZ1kA-2BJJ9xyamvIagC7d3qVJ-2Fz2k5nmojPrRpJKCR1em8cD0VUe2NxIrC8rk2cMvg2afibrMzMjUsD2nWd1dXe9D5IUoGiq5pHDiNGE9qVjuXocv3ztMv7gyl8lz5SX)**

[Or, donate another Just this month we’ve saved net neutrality in the Senate. My bill to protect tribal artifacts was unanimously advanced to the next stage. And while President Trump is trying to shrink public lands, I introduced a bill to protect public lands like the Chaco Canyon area.

This is progress that would not be possible without the support of friends like you. And while President Trump can make all the breaking news headlines he wants, we are going to keep doing actual work to improve the lives of all New Mexicans and people across the country.

**[Will you have my back and make a donation today to help us reach our fundraising goal before the midnight deadline?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.2hx/voCM1Wt4Q2ykH3Cl56ZnIA/h6/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFLarG9lvvLmQ192R5PFFMpwFLSNOvaD7fnXIgFtAC2dRzq1-2FKIl5k3AkHl2eI6MW-2Fn-2BjwaEmhM61zBMSivH8kyHbzg9iRMZKhFqhLKtewxwbl36pwdkFiKOWgo6eTHRpr0yOcZJm7fszMjDjvcjgdWjMrPHIEVHaKAhV2Os53xYIvGDN7wFqC0GaS60a9EyzIM1C7yRh7PB0XypEP8FBznH2SLc2osX7qihMQku2COFP-2FI4ur-2FPIcCwM-2B7t5pVqnzS1qiZaQGfyfp9NXcfTVzljlPN-2FqQ3iDXo0BL7g2HrW3NChyiAxLnMbbhRXO8eu4Jm3xRDY01Di9Tm0rjJQ1HW)**

Thanks,

Martin

name: Keith Ellison
subject: You haven't supported the Democratic Party yet in 2018 → Chip in before tonight's critical deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
There's a new DNC in town that is committed to grassroots organizing in every state to fight for every seat. That wasn't always the case -- but we're not leaving anything on the table this year.
---
Let's be real for a minute, Derek.

The new DNC is committed to grassroots organizing in every state to fight for every seat. Our party had gotten out of that habit -- but we're not leaving anything on the table this year.

We are committed to electing Democrats at every level of government -- and no other organization can provide the level of direct support to candidates and state parties that the DNC can. Tonight at midnight we're coming up on an important fundraising deadline, and your support will be the reason our candidates win up and down the ballot in November.

**I'm asking you to make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before midnight tonight. Your contribution will help Democrats take on the GOP in all 50 states.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99248/2067028276/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99249/2067028276/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99256/2067028276/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99257/2067028276/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99254/2067028276/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99255/2067028276/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")
** When Tom and I talk about the new DNC, we aren't just saying it for our own health. This organization has made fundamental changes over the past year -- including renewing our commitment to the grassroots.

If there's one thing I know for sure, it's that positive change doesn't come about in this country unless the people come together and demand it. That's what this election is about, and that's exactly why we need your help to elect Democrats across the country in November.

**[According to our records, you haven't donated yet this year -- will you chip in $3 before tonight's critical deadline to stand with Democrats nationwide?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb99252/2067028276/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+As+a+2018+donor&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd")**

We're going to stand up, we're going to fight back, and we're going to win -- but we won't be able to do it without you, Derek.

In solidarity,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d27/4067b0a/5b399fd4c/7fb9925e/2067028276/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180531_ke_nd&source=em_20180531_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180531_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Paul Davis
subject: Peter, you did this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAdDkWba2zBAgsuoR525dOEkEB4jMLl0qNuw2vm-AMM=/2F0EkEzgGOSCQtFEk7GWQpA4lGoaTjOB5EUCSBoE3kw=?gpsid=11_36_918&refcode=em18_180531_filing_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180531_filing_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Dear Peter,

Today, I submitted 4,481 signatures from Kansans from all 25 counties of the second congressional district to the Kansas Secretary of State's Office - more than double the 2,300 required by state law - and I am thrilled to share that we are now officially on the 2018 ballot!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAdDkWba2zBAgsuoR525dOEkEB4jMLl0qNuw2vm-AMM=/2F0EkEzgGOSCQtFEk7GWQpA4lGoaTjOB5EUCSBoE3kw=?gpsid=11_36_918&refcode=em18_180531_filing_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180531_filing_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
---

I'm so proud of the work our field team and volunteers have done over the past weeks to collect signatures, build support, and spread the message of this campaign.

I decided to file by petition because I want our campaign to be reflective of the Kansas values we've always relied upon to get things done in our state. That means listening to our neighbors and working together to solve problems -- regardless of political party. That's why I visited every county in the district before I entered this race last summer, and it's why we returned to all 25 counties in recent weeks to build on the conversation. Kansans are tired of the same old politicians who put special interest agendas and partisan games before the needs of the people. So it doesn't surprise me that I'm the only candidate to file by petition in this race -- the other people running for this seat just want more of the same.

We couldn't have made it this far without help from supporters like you -- and we'll win in November for the same reason.

Thank you for everything,

Paul Davis

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAdDkWba2zBAgsuoR525dOEkEB4jMLl0qNuw2vm-AMM=/2F0EkEzgGOSCQtFEk7GWQpA4lGoaTjOB5EUCSBoE3kw=?gpsid=11_36_918&refcode=em18_180531_filing_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180531_filing_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

| | Can we just say -- days like today are what have made this campaign so successful thus far. Today is our deadline to reach our $25,000 goal. Hitting these goals have given us the resources to fill up gas tanks, buy yard signs, hire field organizers, buy clipboards, and get Kathy's message out to the people of North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. It's why so many people across the state and country are taking notice: **" Democratic women are winning primaries in large numbers, energizing other candidates"**
_-CNN_

**" For congressional hopeful Kathy Manning, the past three months has been full of good news"**
_-The Salisbury Post_

**" Republicans whose jobs once seemed safe are struggling for a 2018 survival strategy" **
_-The Washington Post_ Days like today have made all of our success up to this point possible. And if we want that success to continue in the future, we cannot miss goals. [**_Our deadline is midnight TONIGHT, and we still haven't reached our goal. Can you rush in a contribution before it's too late?_**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427847/e3b7d3/5ca3f935/2555ba24/1696597460/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180531am") Kathy is ready to put in the work it takes to win. subject: our big deadline before GOTV weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS
body:

[](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d3843bd/169f49de/34290dda/338656bc/1249586957/VEsH/ "http://bryancaforio.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_1_3&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_1_3&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_1_3")

| | Peter,

As Bryan's Field Director, I've been spending a lot of time going up, down, and all around the streets of California's 25th District, from the Antelope Valley to Simi Valley and everywhere in between.

**One thing is clear -- CA-25 is fired up and ready to go support Bryan at the polls!**

Now is the time to spread Bryan's message far and wide. That's why we're trying to organize even more Get Out The Vote (GOTV) programs in the lead-up to Election Day!

[**_We need your help to make this happen. We 're still $7,832 short before Saturday's canvasses. Click here to chip in and help us fund our last GOTV push._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-one-week?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=2+-+We+need+your+help+to+make+this+happen+We&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_1_3&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_1_3&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_1_3")

We have to make sure we have pieces of literature to hand out at every door. Our volunteers need clipboards and pens. Supporters want lawn signs they can put outside their yards.

name: Trevor Bernardo
subject: Volunteering on the Morse Campaign-All Hands on Deck
body:
Hello,

Thank you very much for signing up to volunteer on the Jessica Morse Campaign. With only 5 days until the Primary we are asking for all hands on deck to help Get Out The Vote. With such an important election coming up, we are making sure that we do everything we can to get Jessica elected.

We have events planned across the District heading into the 5th. If you are interested in volunteering please take a look at these links or respond to this email directly and I will get you plugged into the closest event to you!

[10-County Tour Events:](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/)
- [Fresno County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/27/fresno-county-phone-bank-with-jessica-morse)
- [Mariposa County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/31/mariposa-county-canvass-launch-with-jessica-morse)
- [Madera County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/31/mariposa-county-canvass-launch-with-jessica-morse-54spd)
- [Tuolumne County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/27/fresno-county-phone-bank-with-jessica-morse-c24r7)
- [Calaveras County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/29/week-to-primary-event-djekm)
- [Amador County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/31/mariposa-county-canvass-launch-with-jessica-morse-54spd-cy7sz)
- [El Dorado County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/31/mariposa-county-canvass-launch-with-jessica-morse-54spd-x5yn3)
- [Placer County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/31/mariposa-county-canvass-launch-with-jessica-morse-54spd-keadj)
- [Nevada County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/5/30/sonora-weekly-wednesday-phone-bank-last-one-before-the-primary-gl4wy)
- [Alpine County](https://www.morse4congress.com/events/2018/6/2/alpine-county-phone-bank-with-jessica-morse)

If you are interested in helping remotely with phone banking or texting, please follow these links:

Here's the sign up link to text: [https://rr.team/text-morse](https://rr.team/text-morse)

Here's the instructions sheet: [https://rr.team/morse-instruction](https://rr.team/morse-instruction)

Thank you very much for your support!

5 Days Until Election Day,

\--

Trevor Bernardo
Field Director

(864) 764-2618
[trevor@morse4congress.com](mailto:trevor@morse4congress.com)

name: Tina Smith
subject: A hard memory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There's simply too much at stake. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9c/3269169405/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Even though it's finally spring across the country, I can't help but think of November. I think we're all a little more guarded about Election Day since 2016. So many of us planned big parties, but the air turned somber and the party poppers stayed in their bags. Every election night since, I just haven't been able to fight the feeling that there's simply more at stake now than ever before. A loss isn't a setback for a few years, but potentially a few generations. That's what at stake in the 2018 midterms if we don't elect Democrats who will fight back against Donald Trump's dangerous agenda. [**I know I'll keep fighting, but I need to know you're with me: Donate $10 or more before our midnight deadline.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9c/3269169405/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9d/3269169405/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9e/3269169405/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9f/3269169405/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a90/3269169405/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a91/3269169405/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a92/3269169405/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema&amount=25")
---
If you're like me, you probably don't want to remember what November 8, 2016 felt like.
But we have to: We have to remember the shock, the sting, the pain, and the fear of what comes next.
We know now what came next: A racist travel ban. Attacks on our systems of justice. Stripping reproductive rights for women. Tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans. Health care cuts for the most vulnerable.
This is what's at stake. We can't afford to forget how we felt then, and why it matters now. And just one seat -- maybe this seat -- could decide whether we take back the Senate. And who knows what could happen then.
[**It's why I'm asking for you to invest in this today: Donate $10 or more, and let's finish May strong.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9c/3269169405/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Tina Smith
[CHIP IN »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b604/c1f7015/685faa9a/11429a9c/3269169405/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema")
