name: Leah Vukmir
subject: re: Friend, are we strong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
It’s our first end-of-month deadline since winning the endorsement, and I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to make sure we meet...
Friend, did you know we’re reaching one of the most crucial deadlines of our campaign in just a few hours?

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=es3jEI7NEdExZtH58yJgs7IFvZbRtjuhwlsDLWMlsYsbGV2rHTB8GLKBdblSsO1uvPF4OzxgMEAOr_G9hAG6llfcitM1WVYVVNOMx08GPLXgQTNc9YvUlI2B47G_NHLZvNdyoMWUvjXAHvUpao00eVJ-9GC5uO0g8h-7bYd-F5w6Z1bU9EpHZsSMYQzEnp9QgxN9Xcr0sagkrPYJlda0b88RKpXCR2O7m4BNdd_3nZezyQeN1hGpvdwn55Ktx_t5OjOBiCe3GHhQoDLtM91R2p1UUEKtwvk9-Y9LGTst_AIZNaTcYV8in53RIHiU6LktCzhOf1Et4Z4vau1QnijlgqvEzaXyeN4OqD1Pk60sbZNDafpg7X81eIuvN6apR2oyAHS9clDlWiuSabLKj9E9W9eYUuaRf3spM8QAFYa3W-s%3D)

It’s our first end-of-month deadline since winning the endorsement, and I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to make sure we meet our goal.

EVERYONE is watching us now, and I want to make sure they know just how strong we are.

[**Can you chip in right now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=es3jEI7NEdExZtH58yJgs7IFvZbRtjuhwlsDLWMlsYsbGV2rHTB8GLKBdblSsO1uvPF4OzxgMEAOr_G9hAG6llfcitM1WVYVVNOMx08GPLXgQTNc9YvUlI2B47G_NHLZvNdyoMWUvjXAHvUpao00eVJ-9GC5uO0g8h-7bYd-F5w6Z1bU9EpHZsSMYQzEnp9Q93oox2ses8WpCeyJMzKT7Zjs8CfoHWiVcqEp5bdLwCVZWpLZaNFOgwMXyvn9ug5h9lL8tQVJeaUSTO5zir4sviSHbQms2AsSb2LAdIa05SCZeXQuqdB90YZIGzHo4yIoiPScNsfQmfwCjVdviRmtCkeIX-5Mhq9qV0GTMEp-zKfvnOBePWDCdtieCcuQElAcm_5rQ_2wPJl_tIJ9wWaItSW4bRwEto2CykJQHTTJyS4%3D)

It should only take a second, but it will mean a lot to our team.

Thanks, friend.

Leah

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend,

This has been quite a month. First, we won the endorsement of the grassroots at the Wisconsin GOP convention, and now we are setting our sights on the general election.

But that means, this will be the very FIRST end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Senator Baldwin.

And everyone will be watching.

That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But friend, we’re still $9,012 away from our goal.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=sOmWZofqSN3rYlGGhDiVPULrXWav6gOgidxxkCDcmsd6oZcQA9ye1Sp24qKVtpUPn6Z6CGg8OY_b-lXdmuJMKrcBUUcF8z0u6bNJma-pyzY3lV2gJBoaY9ubwF_T7Xk4pfSdWc7rcs61qix84NjGI8pIWLyFgqETb-p7Nhu5Dxch4QNnjSqBpkAdOdM8VZWH7FWz6ORm4glWoz_oagMHpNCfij1UK-Iu99YbDvxQsZjo5eKKFrYFgrREXebWvEkF). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=es3jEI7NEdExZtH58yJgs6T0nzauZ6l78Qmi8s7tZPARwgDIyoLaBOlqVTLkQcw-6pSM-YSb9RTbgMa_G7AdzkfwYTLl3oGsexUwZs00FEdxOYPCQr4kFrUK1fV-PnBFSnXHez6qU9rpVV29BaXQT0uXtr5VOCbvbR-rizmoJnZdyH9ZnsLU-_7MumPz9d0NZIOUEq3E1YHiLbiwx7LDhHyeiPyzveZ8GgGuwVdhiWz7wrRTcIl2rgEH23zvbXbkeFg1ZDWeappzQeGJlPi3gmZ7mdRZxsLGa8KfdJUXhTq6r__UW-HqXHEx3pqxMLcr8gph0bpJYk5gB8yFqL_BXWJEGVBZJGZlmSOi4nvojmEzSHQVjhC8AuTWXDjxMJCX) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=es3jEI7NEdExZtH58yJgs6T0nzauZ6l78Qmi8s7tZPCZIsC0nkMUgXUTZEpiQk14NzNY6w500jeMDBMZNSSwFBJb7BqOGfxAkSfH0qb5zYCdmQMrj-uM4Ko9E5PKiJynRyk7pSptcxwsoh0aR75O0ne9q1jNeKLNtT-7155VEGrS0KfdCCvJiWBJPPidcxUD9qymCNStzsXZtJUFPoFzQPga0wPnC037pMN81VPpegd_xO9JwurZUBidliVVGW76aLhERKFFV2MlYb1CFnTjOrKM5QEEsJyoBrW4FzA1ILL2JH446g3D23fis_sv0kWohuIfcXB9vAT-lx_odxgjJDiQuynrTiJAKCTNrzPkYIVC9RfoLh2UfQ8SLP6cAnRB) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=es3jEI7NEdExZtH58yJgs6T0nzauZ6l78Qmi8s7tZPBmRI8D6nGEzm2o7Np0I08RD9NfK340vEPQp1gTStKd-MvM32VToTSfrz8CyJ8qx_WiVRyYz795n3O4jgUbFsyybfDhUZi1P4gSz3WdduM4XhwconutCg-KD72dTICrYwOfWp54VqGMymQIXZMTJ8OiV8WaawCduVfxGf819DxXJ-BbtbBrzYC8Sv8zY54Ve2pzgcQDR4pxUjsQEHCEOLysaW8n7DJ7MAb-88YAJgP7gFeBmNzQddiwvfi-ARbprJROWFwUZPmRhwG6T3i7KaNsxdtl3oUKTf0nkBDC5zPGO4csj1vdkL7LRKv6d2c-O_NAwwYuCahSJ09GX89WIsfCw8VFGKu8PWmqel0VYbbetQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=sOmWZofqSN3rYlGGhDiVPULrXWav6gOgidxxkCDcmsd6oZcQA9ye1Sp24qKVtpUPn6Z6CGg8OY_b-lXdmuJMKrcBUUcF8z0u6bNJma-pyzY3lV2gJBoaY9ubwF_T7Xk4pfSdWc7rcs61qix84NjGI8pIWLyFgqETb-p7Nhu5Dxch4QNnjSqBpkAdOdM8VZWH7FWz6ORm4glWoz_oagMHpNCfij1UK-Iu99YbDvxQsZjo5eKKFrYFgrREXebWvEkF) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=610a6d84088442c9a5514b9e9647733f&_e=sOmWZofqSN3rYlGGhDiVPULrXWav6gOgidxxkCDcmsd6oZcQA9ye1Sp24qKVtpUPn6Z6CGg8OY_b-lXdmuJMKrcBUUcF8z0u6bNJma-pyzY3lV2gJBoaY9ubwF_T7Xk4pfSdWc7rcs61qix84NjGI8pIWLyFgqETb-p7Nhu5Dxch4QNnjSqBpkAdOdM8VZWH7FWz6ORm4glWoz_oagMHpNCfij1UK-Iu99YbDvxQsZjo5eKKFrYFgrREXebWvEkF) to unsubscribe. Friend, did you know we’re reaching one of the most crucial deadlines of our campaign in just a few hours? It’s our first end-of-month deadline since winning the endorsement, and I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to make sure we meet our goal. EVERYONE is watching us now, and I want to make sure they know just how strong we are. It should only take a second, but it will mean a lot to our team. Thanks, friend. Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, This has been quite a month. First, we won the endorsement of the grassroots at the Wisconsin GOP convention, and now we are setting our sights on the general election. But that means, this will be the very FIRST end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Senator Baldwin. And everyone will be watching. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But friend, we’re still $9,012 away from our goal. Friend, this deadline will be a direct reflection of how prepared we are to take on Senator Baldwin. And you can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, the Democrats are going to be jumping for joy. But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re here to win it. We just need to work together now: Friend, anything you can give will make a huge difference, so please don’t hesitate to chip in. Let’s show them how strong we are. name: Ted Budd for Congress
subject: Your Invitation - Join Congressman Budd
body:
Friends,

It has been a busy month of August recess in the district and I am excited to get back to promoting conservative ideas in Washington. As I head back, I am proud to announce I was chosen as FreedomWorks' Member of the Month for September 2017.

Here's what they said:

"Rep. Budd was a strong proponent of repealing and replacing ObamaCare. In a press release, he said, “If history is any guide I’ll take around 2,000 votes this Congress. Most of them will be forgotten. This is not one of those votes. This vote marks the beginning of the end of Obamacare as we know it. The failure of that law can be seen in the double-digit premium increases and monopoly situation in the individual insurance market in our state.” Rep. Budd maintained a principled stance on the issue and understands the disaster that ObamaCare is for the American people.

FreedomWorks’ looks forward to working with Rep. Budd to fight for conservative principles. The August recess is coming to an end. With several congressional deadlines coming up in September, including passing a budget and and beginning work on fundamental tax reform, FreedomWorks’ anticipates the push back from the left and moderate republicans on the issues this fall, but are thankful for members like Rep. Budd who have worked hard to keep the promises on which they were elected." Read more HERE (click link insert).

I am working hard to be your voice in Washington. Thank you for your continued prayers.

Best,

Ted

You're receiving this newsletter because you have shown interest in Congressman Ted Budd.
Not interested anymore? Click here to unsubscribe:
http://click.mlflow.com/link/c/YT05MDM2MTcyNzQyOTA2NDA4NzImYz1qNXk4JmU9MTkyOCZiPTE3OTg2MDI0MiZkPWoxbzZpN3Y=.FzM3cD4NcOX6KTR18Czj3mfxZYLizEP57pSuZ5_9DJU

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: we're nearly there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

I cannot believe our end-of-month deadline just hours away. As Dana emailed earlier, we are working to fund our last mail piece!

This upcoming mailer is part of our campaign's final push before the primary, and I want it to go to as many people in the 7th as possible. We're still $3,350 away of what we need to raise. [**A $25 donation from you will help us reach 100 voters.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C92qAz0R-M2DDXBtHWcDaffMBRlOAnFoJdxa-jSZxbQ=/oH4BmFmYJxIvGJfblVKTS4ydjt6myH5C3t2x-0NUF0Q=?refcode=eom_may2) Can you help us close the gap in these last few hours?

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/C92qAz0R-M2DDXBtHWcDaffMBRlOAnFoJdxa-jSZxbQ=/oH4BmFmYJxIvGJfblVKTS4ydjt6myH5C3t2x-0NUF0Q=?refcode=eom_may2)

I am grateful for the thousands of supporters who've helped us get this far. We are working nonstop, and we can't let up now. We still have goals to meet, a primary to win, and a general election campaign to build. As we give it all we have, please help us accelerate through this deadline. **[Your donation](https://act.myngp.com/el/C92qAz0R-M2DDXBtHWcDaffMBRlOAnFoJdxa-jSZxbQ=/oH4BmFmYJxIvGJfblVKTS4ydjt6myH5C3t2x-0NUF0Q=?refcode=eom_may2)** will give us the fuel we need to do just that.

Thank you so much for being with us, Peter.

Abigail

P.S.: If you've already donated to our end-of-month deadline, thank you!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/C92qAz0R-M2DDXBtHWcDaffMBRlOAnFoJdxa-jSZxbQ=/QVHpVqkRiR2mQQZ2whcldzitNSwKEfxCgr7_mlmbkU0=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/C92qAz0R-M2DDXBtHWcDaffMBRlOAnFoJdxa-jSZxbQ=/bBs6-P-gE59ODBryhjANDhFB0hYWsZpaZGupQROfVrk=)_

---
Peter -- We're rallying to [Defeat MS-13 on Saturday at 2 PM outside the Fairfax Detention Center.](https://www.coreystewart.com/rally_to_defeat_ms-13_in_fairfax_20180602?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=2) Why? Because Fairfax has the WORST MS-13 problem in the state and your leftist County Board & Sheriff officially stopped cooperating with ICE's request to detain criminal illegal aliens. This means ALL criminal illegal aliens, most likely MS-13, will be released back onto Fairfax's streets, putting your family in danger. When I'm elected Senator, I'll push for legislation that will prosecute any state or local official who declares their jurisdiction a Sanctuary City. I'm the only candidate in the June 12th Primary who will fight Sanctuary Cities. [_**Join us on Saturday, June 2nd at 2 PM, to Rally to Defeat MS-13 and remember to vote June 12th!**_](https://www.coreystewart.com/rally_to_defeat_ms-13_in_fairfax_20180602?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=3)
**Rally to Defeat MS-13 in Fairfax**
Fairfax County Detention Center
10520 Judicial Dr
Fairfax, VA 22030
June 2nd, 2018 at 2pm
[RSVP Website](https://www.coreystewart.com/rally_to_defeat_ms-13_in_fairfax_20180602?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=4) \- [RSVP Facebook](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fevents%2F193055024853103%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=5) How do you know I'll keep my promises? Because I have the record to back it up. In Prince William County, I passed the nation's toughest crackdown on illegal immigration and by doing this, over 8,000 criminal illegal aliens were turned over to ICE for deportation, reducing the crime rate by 48.7% in 2-years! Once elected Senator, I'll sponsor a bill to ensure all states & localities work with ICE to deport CRIMINAL illegal aliens. [**Come out and hear my plan to defeat Kaine on June 2nd at 2 PM!**](https://www.coreystewart.com/rally_to_defeat_ms-13_in_fairfax_20180602?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=6) **Food and Drinks provided.
**[](https://www.coreystewart.com/meet_and_greet_in_bristow?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=7)
Everyone is welcome!

Please RSVP - [here](https://www.coreystewart.com/rally_to_defeat_ms-13_in_fairfax_20180602?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=8) [_If you're unable to attend, please consider donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us stay on the road fighting to defeat Tim Kaine._](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Fcoreystewart%2Fc835d1a969020126d8d9f&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=defeatms13infairfaxrally2&n=9) For Virginia, Corey Stewart

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: fight back against hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-zm4drZ_MpmvMUzEHLUmaUSh5HA_YKPYn7etI9CZ1I=/KGiS_g5nTAkMXUHDo7LaQ40ek3rheiuifNgcZfYRaIE=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180531_1_3&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Peter,

My opponent in this election is an anti-Semite, neo-Nazi, Holocaust denier and white supremacist.

Ever since Donald Trump began his run for president, we've seen an upsurge in hateful rhetoric, as well as actual acts of violence against people based on their race, religion and national origin. Art Jones is a product of that, so we must fight his candidacy with everything we've got.

[**Will you make a contribution to our campaign right now, before our end-of-month deadline at midnight? We 're working to raise $9,500 so we have the resources we need to beat this avowed racist in November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-zm4drZ_MpmvMUzEHLUmaUSh5HA_YKPYn7etI9CZ1I=/KGiS_g5nTAkMXUHDo7LaQ40ek3rheiuifNgcZfYRaIE=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180531_1_3&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

This is not who we are as a nation, Peter.

As the head of the Illinois Republican Party said, Jones "is a Nazi whose disgusting, bigoted views have no place in our nation's discourse." We can't allow our leaders to behave in this way without speaking out. And we certainly can't allow Art Jones to become our representative in Congress.

[**Please click here and give toward our end-of-month goal today. We need to raise $9,500, and we have only until midnight to do it.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/B-zm4drZ_MpmvMUzEHLUmaUSh5HA_YKPYn7etI9CZ1I=/KGiS_g5nTAkMXUHDo7LaQ40ek3rheiuifNgcZfYRaIE=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180531_1_3&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks for your help.

Dan

name: Bredesen 2018
subject: Leaked audio from Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
Hey Peter, since Bob’s email yesterday, we’ve heard more about what President Trump had to say about Governor Bredesen and this race while he was in Tennessee...
**In leaked audio from a closed-door fundraiser for our opponent, he said Governor Bredesen was “tough” and this race was “very close.”**
_And he’s exactly right._
In the face of special interest attacks and dark money groups pouring millions into this race, Governor Bredesen has kept his focus on Tennessee.
Tonight, ahead of our monthly fundraising deadline, you have a chance to join Governor Bredesen and tune out the partisan noise and stay focused on the issues that matter to our state. Can we count on your help? Chip in here:

subject: Did you see Amy's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hey there,

I wanted to make sure you saw Amy's email this morning. We're still $3,997 away from our pre-convention goal.

Amy works hard and she get results. She stands up for what's right and also finds common ground to get things done.

This is her election year and we're stepping up. [**Will you help us reach our goal before today's pre-convention deadline?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NUwCVldEleJQF721blsyuTvsml6LZJiD)

Thanks for all you do,

Elise Convy
Finance Director
Amy Klobuchar for Minnesota

_\---------- Forwarded message ----------_
From: Amy Klobuchar
Subject: Progress

Friend --

Our convention starts in less than 24 hours. On Friday Minnesotans will come together from across the state to stand up for our democracy, our values, and for the people of this country.

**And when we stand together, we get things done for all Americans.**

Remember when the President and his allies tried to take away healthcare coverage from millions of Americans? All 48 Senate Democrats stood together -- and three brave Republicans joined us -- and together we defeated that bill. We stood together and we helped people across America.

**Now we need to come together once again to win in November.**

**Will you stand with me and contribute today to help us reach our $30,000 pre-convention goal?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

With your help, we can make it by the deadline!

\-- Amy

**Breaking from _The Washington Post_ : "Nevada is Democrats' best pickup opportunity because it's also one of the most competitive Senate races anywhere in the country."
[Chip in $5 right away to help Jacky Rosen reach her critical end-of-month fundraising goal >>](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd466/4fbb2af3/71d61c31/5e8a0ea0/2174029048/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY5OS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk699-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Team - This is big. The Washington Post just reported that **our race is the best opportunity to flip a red seat blue - and it "could decide control of the Senate."** That means if we're going to take the Senate back for Democrats, we have to do _everything we can_ to elect Jacky Rosen here in Nevada.
A new poll shows our race is neck and neck. But right now, we're falling short of tonight's end-of-month fundraising goal.

There's a lot on the line: our ability to protect the Affordable Care Act, defend Medicare, and keep extremists off the Supreme Court all depends on Democrats taking back the Senate in November.
That's why each and every deadline we face is crucial. We're up against Mitch McConnell and right-wing billionaire donors who are desperate to hold onto Republican Senate control by any means necessary.**[Can you help us stop them and turn Nevada blue? clean_body: Breaking from The Washington Post : "Nevada is Democrats' best pickup opportunity because it's also one of the most competitive Senate races anywhere in the country." "" Team - This is big. The Washington Post just reported that our race is the best opportunity to flip a red seat blue - and it "could decide control of the Senate." That means if we're going to take the Senate back for Democrats, we have to do everything we can to elect Jacky Rosen here in Nevada. A new poll shows our race is neck and neck. But right now, we're falling short of tonight's end-of-month fundraising goal. There's a lot on the line: our ability to protect the Affordable Care Act, defend Medicare, and keep extremists off the Supreme Court all depends on Democrats taking back the Senate in November. That's why each and every deadline we face is crucial. We're up against Mitch McConnell and right-wing billionaire donors who are desperate to hold onto Republican Senate control by any means necessary. "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. name: Bob Casey
subject: we're falling behind, and it's time to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Important update for you:

I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and she told me that we are still $5,200 short of where we need to be to meet our May fundraising goal. We are less than a month into the general election, and right now, my staff is debating between cutting our advertising plan, hiring fewer staff or making smaller investments in our field operation.

That worries me, to tell you the truth, because ever since I voted against the GOP's tax scheme, they've really stepped up their attacks against me. I sided with working families, not corporations or billionaires, and national Republicans aren't happy about that. President Trump attacked me for my vote in a tweet earlier this month and has been praising my opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, and you'd better believe that Republican donors are paying attention.

You've probably already heard that Democrats can take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the President's dangerous anti-middle-class agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat in Pennsylvania, so we need to close our $5,200 budget gap and finish the month strong.

**Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could take it a step further and become a campaign donor by chipping in $5 or more by midnight to help keep this race competitive.**

Here's the link: **_[https://secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6757/51dbcc2a/77e25a5/3a2f7fc/1919522314/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUzMV9mcjJfbmRfdjFzMiIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180531_fr2_nd_v1s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6757/51dbcc2a/77e25a5/3a2f7fd/1919522314/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia PA 19102 United States

name: Khizr Khan
subject: If my son were still here today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Like many immigrants, I came to this country empty handed -- but I believed in American democracy.
---
I am a patriotic American Muslim with undivided loyalty to our country, Derek.

Like many immigrants, I came to this country empty handed -- but I believed in the American dream. So did many others who sacrificed their lives defending this country.

If my son, U.S. Army Capt. Humayun Khan, was still here today, he would be appalled by Donald Trump and his hateful agenda. Trump has done nothing but smear the character of Muslims, try to build walls to divide us, and threaten the democratic values my son and many other immigrants died protecting.

**Tonight the Democratic Party faces an important fundraising deadline. Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before then to elect Democrats nationwide who will defend our values?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=3")
[DONATE: $10](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=10 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=10")
[DONATE: $25](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=25 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=25")
[DONATE: $50](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=50 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=50")
[DONATE: $100](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=100 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=100")
[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kk-may-deadline-2018 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kk-may-deadline-2018")
** Many patriots like my son are buried in the Arlington National Cemetery -- people of all faiths, genders, and ethnicities who died defending our country. They gave their lives for our country's ideals. We cannot let this president and his party trample on those ideals any more than they already have.

We must elect Democrats in November who will stand up to the Trump administration and its terrible, harmful policies.

**[Don't take November's election lightly: Chip in $3 to help elect Democrats who will fight for the future of every American.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kk-may-deadline-2018 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kk-may-deadline-2018")**

Thank you,

Khizr Khan

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email"). Click [here](http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

| | | Team -- I’m proud to work for Martin. The progress he is making in the Senate will help New Mexicans and our country. All hope isn’t lost in the age of Trump when we have someone like Martin fighting for our values.

**[Will you make a donation right now to Martin’s re-election campaign and help us reach our goal before midnight?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/1wA/ni0YAA/t.2hx/dU6IiI2nQ3itu0clWP-mDw/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFLarG9lvvLmQ192R5PFFMpwFLSNOvaD7fnXIgFtAC2dRzq1-2FKIl5k3AkHl2eI6MW-2Fn-2BjwaEmhM61zBMSivH8ky72hIHAjYrWuaioDi3YeFNa0aiyyNhq5AEQLEYrBUlGn3sEBWKCBjBiCbq4NfNKHDCFdg0sJa35n2spLaWk-2BgL0ut9xn2-2BUl6IZAieuFki9SFtHoFp7qaY4EBDuenkNUjI-2BNU8NFmJtO8jzEAGnmXCfQ0M77Ni6kDQHObhtQrs3TNaN-2FRiEwQADqO48NA4hCMdbhPqMe04r9rXUJzg0FXR-2BhDLUnFP26E0hWCSdRbAKgrVK0wLzc1kQausx6b3zD-2BoePphYPunO3yO8RgjgnRqQ-3D-3D)**

_Begin Forwarded Message from Martin Heinrich:_

Friend,

I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want you to know that I’m doing everything I can to earn it.

I know politics can seem hopeless at times. The daily barrage of scandals, lies, corruption, and international blunders coming from the Trump administration can be extremely discouraging, but I want you to know that real progress is being made in the Senate on issues that are important to New Mexico and to people across the country.

**I’m working every day to make sure that we fight back against the disastrous policies of the Trump administration and that our values and ideals are moving forward to improve lives.**

That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November.

**[To make sure that doesn’t happen, we need to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal by bringing in $20,000 in grassroots donations. amount](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/1wA/ni0YAA/t.2hx/dU6IiI2nQ3itu0clWP-mDw/h6/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFLarG9lvvLmQ192R5PFFMpdj0aBTGv3dcXuWjn8VvQRIFRpCUcjVI8bngej-2FHn70kM75KDrdZQ7nm0DSmbJJ9K72TW6J-2FEqmfLeLZ9gKN8r7AMiA385HhYlHjvhPaYygf85JP2EhczX2Gh2KTN4XR8oxwTG1xYpBaZpG8YH6M05iwAcj5INCUrdzOVsgp1DV-2B87SYHOe8UCFcLtQC8sCOmCL-2F6OPDF93l1GgRUdc8WyTFEBrIoUffK7lM0B61iIbN3EUOfAs0qrKx-2BDHHjWJ6rU9Ean-2BwwebZUllgOCgdnSePjDWvelYhb4C1cfFX7VKYKYGGbbVy9Nj8B7J-2B3a9Be) My bill to protect tribal artifacts was unanimously advanced to the next stage. Martin

And while President Trump is trying to shrink public lands, I introduced a bill to protect public lands like the Chaco Canyon area. This is progress that would not be possible without the support of friends like you. And while President Trump can make all the breaking news headlines he wants, we are going to keep doing actual work to improve the lives of all New Mexicans and people across the country. Your support means so much to me. Thanks, Martin Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Martin Heinrich for US Senate, please .

body:
#
Wanna help? Don't miss out...

Friend --
This is it -- if you've been waiting to donate (and I get it, I'm a procrastinator too), then this is your actual, for real, definitely last reminder to donate before our midnight deadline.
But one quick thing: A year ago today, Ben announced his candidacy for governor of Maryland. We've been doing this for a year -- can you believe it?

subject: FWD: We cannot let Mario get a free ride in this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
Friend,
Hey... it's Sam... just checking to see if you saw Mary's message from earlier. A couple dozen people came to the plate, but we are still a little short of our end of May goal and only have hours left.
Would you mind lending us a quick hand? [**As it stands, we only need 9 more donations to reach our target. Any amount -- small or big -- counts and help us build momentum for the months ahead.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4P_mz66TeuD4Y3C6Uq1KmVC_XDx37djf1Jv9W-BGCCk=/mxMxfIO37ltmKwA_7Dv254EcM45alNoA9FT7dDWNlvk=?refcode=May-31-FWD)
Please help us win this district and take back Congress -- so much is at stake.
**\- Sam**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
Date: Thu, May 31, 2018 at 4:09 AM
Subject: We cannot let Mario get a free ride in this election
To: Sam Miller
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4P_mz66TeuD4Y3C6Uq1KmVC_XDx37djf1Jv9W-BGCCk=/mxMxfIO37ltmKwA_7Dv254EcM45alNoA9FT7dDWNlvk=?refcode=May-31-FWD)

Sam,
Sam, my campaign manager, is telling me we have not reached our target of 150 contributions.
[**We still need 33 more people to step up before 11:59 PM TONIGHT. Can you help out really quick? All amounts -- even as little as $5 -- provide a big lift to the campaign!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4P_mz66TeuD4Y3C6Uq1KmVC_XDx37djf1Jv9W-BGCCk=/mxMxfIO37ltmKwA_7Dv254EcM45alNoA9FT7dDWNlvk=?refcode=May-31-FWD)
I promised voters in the district that Mario Diaz-Balart would not get a free ride in this election. HE NEEDS TO ANSWER FOR:
* his campaign $$$ and 'A rating' from the NRA.
* his denial of science & refusal to act on sea-level rise.
* his dozens of votes to strip people of their healthcare.
* his support for 94% of Trump's policies.

[**Please help us win this district. Right now, the Cook Political Report only has us down 2-4 percentage points. We just need a few more people to step up so we can win the district and Democrats can take back Congress.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4P_mz66TeuD4Y3C6Uq1KmVC_XDx37djf1Jv9W-BGCCk=/mxMxfIO37ltmKwA_7Dv254EcM45alNoA9FT7dDWNlvk=?refcode=May-31-FWD)
We only have a few more hours remaining -- thank you for coming together.
**\- Mary**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4P_mz66TeuD4Y3C6Uq1KmVC_XDx37djf1Jv9W-BGCCk=/mxMxfIO37ltmKwA_7Dv254EcM45alNoA9FT7dDWNlvk=?refcode=May-31-btn-FWD)

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4575/24c69fd9/1b02915f6/188e273e/4138474353/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ78N_digital_email_20180531_EOMJuneSpecials_inact&source=WQEFEQ78N_digital_email_20180531_EOMJuneSpecials_inact")

Peter,

We're on the brink of flipping two more state legislative seats from red to blue!

In June, voters in Missouri and Wisconsin will head to the polls, and two of our women -- Lauren Arthur (MO-SD17) and Ann Groves Lloyd (WI-AD42) -- will be on the ballot.

So far, 41 Democrats have already flipped state legislative seats since Trump's inauguration. Helping Lauren and Ann win their special elections in June is critical to showing that we still have momentum.

**Donate $3 before midnight to help hit our $275,000 End-of-Month goal and flip more state legislative seats:**

name: Susan Klein, MO Right to Life Federal PAC
subject: Why we support Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
As Executive Director of Missouri Right to Life, I am proud to endorse Josh Hawley as our next U.S. Senator. Josh Hawley

Hello Peter,

As Executive Director of Missouri Right to Life Federal PAC, **I am proud to endorse Josh Hawley as our next U.S. Senator. **

As Attorney General, Josh has fought aggressive pro-abortion organizations, and I know he will work just as hard in D.C. to protect the most vulnerable and innocent among us.

Across the nation, abortion groups are doing all they can to silence anyone who wishes to speak out for those who cannot defend themselves. That is why now, more than ever, it is imperative that we elect a passionate pro-life candidate like Josh Hawley, to the U.S. Senate.

I hope you will join me in supporting him.

Sincerely,

Susan Klein
Executive Director
MO Right to Life Federal PAC

clean_body: As Executive Director of Missouri Right to Life, I am proud to endorse Josh Hawley as our next U.S. Senator. Josh Hawley Hello Peter, As Executive Director of Missouri Right to Life Federal PAC, I am proud to endorse Josh Hawley as our next U.S. Senator. As Attorney General, Josh has fought aggressive pro-abortion organizations, and I know he will work just as hard in D.C. to protect the most vulnerable and innocent among us. Across the nation, abortion groups are doing all they can to silence anyone who wishes to speak out for those who cannot defend themselves. That is why now, more than ever, it is imperative that we elect a passionate pro-life candidate like Josh Hawley, to the U.S. Senate. I hope you will join me in supporting him. body:
#
Peter -- I promise, this will be the last email from my team about tonight’s fundraising deadline.
But first, I wanted to thank you for all the support you’ve shown our campaign already. I’ve been humbled by the momentum our campaign has been gaining this early in the race, and it’s only been possible because of people like you stepping up to support us.
If we can win this race the right way, by bringing people together instead of dividing them, we’ll have a real shot at fixing the dysfunction in Congress and getting our leaders focused on getting things done for Tennessee families.
[**That’s why this election matters. name: Jason Sydoriak
subject: Re: a few things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Peter,
Wanted to make sure you saw Emma’s email?
I know it’s late but I wanted to quickly chime in to say that we’ve JUST decided on a fundraising goal -- and it’s ambitious.
My job is to keep track of the finances which is how I know that we have to raise $16,540 more before midnight to win on Tuesday.
We are confident that if we can reach this goal we’ll be able to get our message out across the district. But we need your help.
You can use this special secure link to chip in directly towards our voter outreach efforts: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180531_2_4&amount=25&recurring=AUTO [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180531_2_4&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
Begin Forwarded Message: Hi team,
Going into the last week of the campaign, I want to keep you updated on all the news on the ground:
*
Momentum:
Increasing!
*
Energy:
Through
the
roof
*
Resources:
[PENDING]
We are seeing all the energy and momentum flood in Regina’s direction this week. We are poised to win this thing. The only question is whether we will have the resources we need to contact undecided voters.
Will you contribute today towards our May fundraising deadline - the last deadline before the primary - so we be able to reach all the undecided voters before Tuesday? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180531_2_4&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180531_2_4&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
This week is our last chance to take a stand for Regina and our movement. Will you please make a donation to ensure we get over the finish line next week?
Thank you!
Emma

name: Team Gillum
subject: Only a few hours to go
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3065/9e00690/47883c79/2402320d/1569437983/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&source=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG")
Last chance friends, don't forget to chip in before our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight.

This is our opportunity to show everyone Andrew's momentum and how we're going to elect a progressive leader to the Governor's mansion -- but we're still $1,230 shy of where we need to be to stay on track.

**[So chip in $5 before midnight tonight!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3065/9e00690/47883c79/2402320c/1569437983/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_843&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+So+chip+in++ask++before+midnight+tonight")**

Thank you,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3065/9e00690/47883c79/2402320f/1569437983/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_843&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Brendan McPhillips, Andrew Gillum for Governor
Date: Thurs, May 31, 2018
Subject: Let's keep it up

Friends --

Last week in Georgia we saw Stacey Abrams, an unapologetically progressive candidate, re-write the political playbook. The cynics told her -- just like they've told us -- that she couldn't run and win with big bold ideas.

But she proved them wrong -- and we're ready to do the same thing here in the Sunshine State. And to do that, we need your help, friends .

**[Let's show them we're ready to get rid of the old ways of doing business, and win again as progressives. Chip in $5 to help keep up the momentum.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3065/9e00690/47883c79/2402320e/1569437983/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_843&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Letrsquos+show+them+wersquore+ready+to+g")**

We're still $3,684 away from reaching our fundraising goal, and we only have a few hours today to make up for it.

subject: this is serious ... we're in crunch time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
---
| | Hi Peter, did you see Karen's message?

This is real. As Bryan's Finance Director, I've been going through the spreadsheets. It's clear: we're in crunch time.

If we don't meet our big goal by Saturday, we may not be able to expand our Get Out The Vote (GOTV) programs. That would be devastating, especially since Election Day is THIS TUESDAY!

[**_Can you help us make up the $3,901 we need before Saturday 's deadline right now? Click here to chip in immediately._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-one-week?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+help+us+make+up+the+3901+we+need&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4")

Thank you!

**Begin forwarded message:**

Peter,

As Bryan's Field Director, I've been spending a lot of time going up, down, and all around the streets of California's 25th District, from the Antelope Valley to Simi Valley and everywhere in between.

**One thing is clear -- CA-25 is fired up and ready to go support Bryan at the polls!**

Now is the time to spread Bryan's message far and wide. That's why we're trying to organize even more Get Out The Vote (GOTV) programs in the lead-up to Election Day!

[**_We need your help to make this happen. We 're still $7,832 short before Saturday's canvasses. Click here to chip in and help us fund our last GOTV push._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-one-week?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=2+-+We+need+your+help+to+make+this+happen+We&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4")

The stakes are pretty high, Peter. If we don't reach our big goal, we may not be able to fund our GOTV programs.

We have to make sure we have pieces of literature to hand out at every door. Our volunteers need clipboards and pens. Supporters want lawn signs they can put outside their yards.

**[**_GOTV weekend is almost here. We need your help to spread Bryan's positive message across CA-25: Chip in now and help us raise the $7,832 we need by Saturday._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-one-week?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=3+-+GOTV+weekend+is+almost+here+We+need+your&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180531_2_4")**

Karen Diaz

name: Kathy Manning
subject: One last thing for you to do today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress ***
body:
Can we just say -- days like today are what have made this campaign so successful thus far.

Today is our deadline to reach our $25,000 goal. Hitting these goals have given us the resources to fill up gas tanks, buy yard signs, hire field organizers, buy clipboards, and get Kathy's message to the people of North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. It's why so many people across the state and country are taking notice:

"Democratic women are winning primaries in large numbers, energizing other candidates"
-CNN

"For congressional hopeful Kathy Manning, the past three months has been full of good news."
-The Salisbury Post

"Republicans whose jobs once seemed safe are struggling for a 2018 survival strategy"
-The Washington Post

Days like today have made all of our success up to this point possible. And if we want that success to continue in the future, we cannot miss goals.

Our deadline is midnight TONIGHT, and we still haven't reached our goal. Can you rush in a contribution before it's too late?

Kathy is ready to put in the work it takes to win. She's not focused on doing the bidding of special interests or smear campaigns. She's focused on giving North Carolina families the best possible representation in Congress. That's why she's traveled thousands of miles across this district meeting with voters and listening to their concerns.

But the Washington special interests know their best ally in Congress, Rep. Ted Budd, is in some serious trouble. They will do whatever they can (aka, spend whatever they can) to keep Budd in Congress.

The resources we gather will make it possible to counter the attacks and come out ahead in November. Every goal matters.

Help us raise the last $2,434 we need to reach this May goal. Give whatever you can >>

We have the power to make today another success. Let's make it happen.

clean_body: Can we just say -- days like today are what have made this campaign so successful thus far. Today is our deadline to reach our $25,000 goal. Hitting these goals have given us the resources to fill up gas tanks, buy yard signs, hire field organizers, buy clipboards, and get Kathy's message to the people of North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. It's why so many people across the state and country are taking notice: "Democratic women are winning primaries in large numbers, energizing other candidates" -CNN "For congressional hopeful Kathy Manning, the past three months has been full of good news." -The Salisbury Post "Republicans whose jobs once seemed safe are struggling for a 2018 survival strategy" -The Washington Post Days like today have made all of our success up to this point possible. And if we want that success to continue in the future, we cannot miss goals. Our deadline is midnight TONIGHT, and we still haven't reached our goal. Can you rush in a contribution before it's too late? Kathy is ready to put in the work it takes to win. She's not focused on doing the bidding of special interests or smear campaigns. She's focused on giving North Carolina families the best possible representation in Congress. That's why she's traveled thousands of miles across this district meeting with voters and listening to their concerns. But the Washington special interests know their best ally in Congress, Rep. Ted Budd, is in some serious trouble. They will do whatever they can (aka, spend whatever they can) to keep Budd in Congress. The resources we gather will make it possible to counter the attacks and come out ahead in November. Every goal matters. Help us raise the last $2,434 we need to reach this May goal. Give whatever you can >> We have the power to make today another success. Let's make it happen. Team Kathy * Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress *

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We should be doing this too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203584/2fde7c66/46489f40/15683e41/2701013178/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_911&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Elections matter, friend.

Yesterday, Viriginia's legislature voted to expand Medicaid -- meaning up to 400,000 more Virginians will now have health coverage.

This would have been unthinkable last year in Virginia. Going into Election Day, Republicans held 66 of the 100 seats in their House of Delegates.

But, across the commonwealth, Democrats came together and organized. They made calls, knocked on doors, and spoke with their neighbors and friends. They broke the Republican majority and they won. And now look at the results.

**We can do that here in North Carolina, too. We have to. We're just hours away from our final May deadline and we still need to raise another $3,673. Can I count on you to help us out?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203584/2fde7c66/46489f40/15683e40/2701013178/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_911&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=2+-++ask++raquo")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203584/2fde7c66/46489f40/15683e43/2701013178/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_911&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_content=3+-++ask2++raquo")
---
| [**$100 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203584/2fde7c66/46489f40/15683e42/2701013178/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNeUI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_911&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_content=4+-++ask3++raquo")
---
| [**Other »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203584/2fde7c66/46489f40/15683e45/2701013178/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_911&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+Other+raquo")
---
As Virginia was voting to expand Medicaid, something much different was happening in our own legislature.

After secretly crafting the state's budget behind closed doors -- without giving Democrats the chance to weigh in or offer any amendments, Republicans in the legislature revealed their full budget and they did NOT expand Medicaid.

Instead of doing what's needed for teacher pay or safer schools, they decided to protect their tax breaks for corporations and people making over $200,000 per year.

**[It doesn't have to be this way. November is coming -- let's make it count. Chip in before the midnight deadline.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203584/2fde7c66/46489f40/15683e44/2701013178/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_911&refcode=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180531_EOM4_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=6+-+It+doesnt+have+to+be+this+way+November+i")**

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy

* * *

name: Rahsheim Wright
subject: This campaign is about you
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2d/767134fb/5f696627/43383720/3657571584/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hey , I wanted to make sure you saw Donna's note. We are just weeks away from the Maryland Primary Election. Donna is running a grassroots-powered campaign that puts working people and their families at the center of her vision for Prince George's County. **I****n order to help Donna reach victory, we need to raise $3,000 by midnight to assist with GOTV efforts. [Will you make a contribution of $10 or more by midnight?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2d/767134fb/5f696627/43383721/3657571584/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager Donna for Prince George's County **\-------Forwarded Message-------** Hi , From the very beginning, I made a promise that I would not accept donations from big developers who priorities their profits over the people of Prince George's County--and I have kept that promise. I'll be honest with you - this is a very close election, and the path to victory is not an easy one.**My campaign relies on the grassroots support of people like you. In the weeks leading up to the Primary, I need that support more than ever.[Can you make a contribution of $10 or more by midnight?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2d/767134fb/5f696627/43383721/3657571584/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** My campaign for County Executive has always been about you--the hard-working people and families who call Prince George's County their home. As County Executive, I will deliver by improving education, creating an innovative economy, focusing development to create opportunities for all Prince Georgians, and ensuring that big developers pay their fair share. I cannot make this vision a reality without you.[**If you want a County Executive who will put working people and their families first, show your support by making a contribution of $10 or more by midnight tonight. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2d/767134fb/5f696627/43383721/3657571584/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") Thank you very much for your support. Together, we have the power to build a stronger Prince George's County. Donna Edwards

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Not good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Coming up short is not an option.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7918a/2f5ea88d/70e58587/2cbcff06/1192714011/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-6-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'll cut to the chase: We're coming up short on our May fundraising goal. That's not good. If we don't hit our goal, Trump Republicans from coast to coast will say it's a sign the 2018 blue wave is non-existent and progressives don't have grassroots strength or support. They'll take it for granted that their heinous acts are acceptable to the voting public -- like last year's withdrawal from the Paris agreement. [**We must let them know that their actions are not ok.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7918a/2f5ea88d/70e58587/2cbcff06/1192714011/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-6-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") **Republicans are looking for signs of weakness wherever they can find them. We can't give them this one.** [**We need $2,105 more before midnight. No ifs, ands, or buts. Can you rush a donation immediately to help get us over the top?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7918a/2f5ea88d/70e58587/2cbcff06/1192714011/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-6-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") You've always had my back before as we lead this progressive movement together -- can I count on you one more time before midnight tonight? Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7918a/2f5ea88d/70e58587/2cbcff06/1192714011/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-31_eom-6-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-6-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")
